verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: On the benefit of good works and mercy.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In works and alms, even if by smallness of power less be done, that the will itself is enough.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That charity and brotherly love must be religiously and stedfastly practised.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must boast in nothing, since nothing is our own.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That humility and quietness is to be maintained in all things.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That all good and righteous men suffer more, but ought to endure because they are proved.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not grieve the Holy Spirit whom we have received.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That anger must be overcome, lest it constrain us to sin.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That brethren ought to sustain one another.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must trust in God only, and in Him we must glory.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That he who has attained to faith, having put off the former man, ought to regard only celestial and spiritual things, and to give no heed to the world which he has already renounced.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not swear.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we are not to curse.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must never murmur, but bless God concerning all things that happen.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That men are tried by God for this purpose, that they may be proved.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Of the benefit of martyrdom.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That what we suffer in this world is of less account than is the reward which is promised.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That nothing must be preferred to the love of God and of Christ.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not obey our own will, but that of God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the foundation and strength of hope and faith is fear.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not rashly judge of another.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That when we have received a wrong, we must remit and forgive it.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That evil is not to be returned for evil.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it is impossible to attain to the Father but by Christ.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That unless a man have been baptized and born again, he cannot attain to the kingdom of God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it is of small account to be baptized and to receive the Eucharist, unless one profits by it both in deeds and works.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That even a baptized person loses the grace which he has attained, unless he keep innocency.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That remission cannot in the Church be granted unto him who has sinned against God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it was before predicted concerning the hatred of the Name.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That what any one has vowed to God, he must quickly pay.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That he who does not believe is judged already.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Of the benefit of virginity and of continency.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the Father judgeth nothing, but the Son; and the Father is not honoured by him by whom the Son is not honoured.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the believer ought not to live like the Gentiles.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That God is patient for this end, that we may repent of our sin and be reformed.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That a woman ought not to be adorned in a worldly manner.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the believer ought not to be punished for other offences but for the name he bears only.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the servant of God ought to be innocent, lest he fall into secular punishment.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the example of living is given to us in Christ.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not labour boastfully or noisily.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not speak foolishly and offensively.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That faith is of advantage altogether, and that we can do as much as we believe.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That he who truly believes can immediately obtain.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the believers who differ among themselves ought not to refer to a Gentile judge.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That hope is of future things, and therefore that faith concerning those things which are promised ought to be patient.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That a woman ought to be silent in the church.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it arises from our fault and our desert that we suffer, and do not perceive God’s help in everything.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not take usury.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That even our enemies are to be loved.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the sacrament of the faith must not be profaned.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That no one should be uplifted in his doing.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the liberty of believing or of not believing is placed in free choice.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the secrets of God cannot be seen through, and therefore that our faith ought to be simple.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That none is without filth and without sin.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not please men, but God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That nothing that is done is hidden from God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the believer is amended and reserved.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That no one should be made sad by death, since in living is labour and peril, in dying peace and the certainty of resurrection.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Of the idols which the Gentiles think gods.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That too great lust of food is not to be desired.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the lust of possessing, and money, are not to be desired.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That marriage is not to be contracted with Gentiles.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the sin of fornication is grievous.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: What are those carnal things which beget death, and what are the spiritual things which lead to life.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That all sins are put away in baptism.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the discipline of God is to be observed in Church precepts.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it was foretold that men would despise sound discipline.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must depart from him who lives irregularly and contrary to discipline.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the kingdom of God is not in the wisdom of the world, nor in eloquence, but in the faith of the cross and in virtue of conversation.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must obey parents.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And that fathers ought not to be bitter against their children.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That servants, when they believe, ought the more to be obedient to their fleshly masters.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Likewise that masters ought to be more gentle.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That every widow that is approved ought to be honoured.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That every person ought to have care rather of his own people, and especially of believers.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That one who is older must not rashly be accused.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the sinner is to be publicly reproved.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not speak with heretics.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That innocency asks with confidence, and obtains.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the devil has no power against man unless God have allowed it.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That wages be quickly paid to the hireling.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That divination must not be used.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That a tuft of hair is not to be worn on the head.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the beard must not be plucked.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must rise when a bishop or a presbyter comes.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That a schism must not be made, even although he who withdraws should remain in one faith and in the same tradition.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That believers ought to be simple with prudence.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That a brother must not be deceived.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the end of the world comes suddenly.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That a wife must not depart from her husband; or if she departs, she must remain unmarried.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That every one is tempted so much as he is able to bear.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That not everything is to be done which is lawful.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That it was foretold that heresies would arise.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the Eucharist is to be received with fear and honour.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we are to live with the good, but to avoid the evil.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must labour with deeds, not with words.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must hasten to faith and to attainment.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the catechumen ought to sin no more.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That judgment will be in accordance with the terms, before the law, of equity; after Moses, of the law.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the grace of God ought to be gratuitous.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the Holy Spirit has often appeared in fire.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That all good men ought willingly to hear rebuke.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must abstain from much speaking.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not lie.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That they are frequently to be corrected who do wrong in domestic service.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That when a wrong is received, patience is to be maintained, and that vengeance is to be left to God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not use detraction.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we must not lay snares against our neighbour.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the sick are to be visited.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That tale-bearers are accursed.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the sacrifices of evil men are not acceptable.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That those are more severely judged who in this world have more power.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That widows and orphans ought to be protected.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That while one is in the flesh, he ought to make confession.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That flattery is pernicious.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That God is more loved by him who has had many sins forgiven in baptism.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That there is a strong conflict to be waged against the devil, and that therefore we ought to stand bravely, that we may be able to conquer.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Of Antichrist, that he will come as a man.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the yoke of the law was heavy, which is cast off by us; and that the Lord’s yoke is light, which is taken up by us.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That we are to be urgent in prayers.
